_comment: FORGE parts + torque catalog for the PL45LM-class turn-mill. Synthetic part numbers and distilled specs — NOT reproduced from any manufacturer manual. Torque values are plausible engineering figures authored for this demo, not OEM data. The model must NEVER state a part number or torque from memory; it must call lookup_part / lookup_torque.

drawbar.name: Spindle drawbar
drawbar.spec: BT40 drawbar, disc-spring clamp stack, 20 mm bore for through-spindle coolant
drawbar.notes: Unclamp delay is the most common drawbar symptom; inspect disc springs and the unclamp cylinder.

drawbar_disc_springs.name: Drawbar disc spring stack (Belleville)
drawbar_disc_springs.spec: 18-element Belleville stack, replace as a matched set; free length 96.0 mm (replace below 90 mm)

spindle_bearings.name: Spindle bearing pack (angular contact)
spindle_bearings.spec: Angular-contact set, grease-for-life, DBB front pair + single rear

coolant_union.name: Through-spindle coolant union
coolant_union.spec: 20 bar rotary union, replaceable carbon face seal

tool_holder.name: BT40 tool holder
tool_holder.spec: BT40 taper, standard pull stud P40T-I, balanced to G2.5 @ 8000 rpm

turret_index_motor.name: Turret indexing servo motor
turret_index_motor.spec: 2.0 kW servo, absolute encoder, bidirectional shortest-path indexing

x_ballscrew.name: X-axis ballscrew
x_ballscrew.spec: 32 mm dia, 10 mm lead, double-nut preloaded, C3 grade

linear_guide.name: Linear guideway block
linear_guide.spec: 35 mm profile rail block, self-lubricating, 4 per axis

way_lube_pump.name: Centralized way-lube pump
way_lube_pump.spec: Metered single-line lube, 3 MPa, ISO VG68 way oil

tool_holder_bolt.name: Tool-holder retention bolt
tool_holder_bolt.lubrication: Light oil on threads; do not exceed — alloy holder
tool_holder_bolt.notes: Tightening to 12 Nm. Re-check after first tool change.

drawbar_locknut.name: Drawbar disc-spring locknut
drawbar_locknut.sequence: Single nut; set clamp force to 13.5 kN, then lock
drawbar_locknut.lubrication: Dry; verify clamp force with load cell after torque
